Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows impaired renal function (elevated creatinine), mild hypoglycemia, low total protein and globulin, mildly elevated ALT, low AST, and dyslipidemia (high LDL, low HDL). These findings suggest possible chronic kidney disease, mild liver enzyme disturbance, and increased cardiovascular risk. Clinical correlation and further evaluation are recommended.
Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
